RcppStudent 0.0.1
  • Reference

RcppStudent: Expose the Student C++ Class using 'Rcpp Modules'

Source: R/student-pkg.R
RcppStudent-package.Rd

Provides an implementation of a Student 'C++' class being connected to 'R' using 'Rcpp Modules' to expose the underlying class methods.

Details

RcppStudent is a package showing how to use Rcpp Modules to make available a C++ class under S4.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/coatless-rd-rcpp/rcpp-modules-student

  • https://rd-rcpp.thecoatlessprofessor.com/rcpp-modules-student/

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/coatless-rd-rcpp/rcpp-modules-student/issues
